pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 37-38 create the file at this exact path
setup_task.sh line 26 hardcodes subject in expected_values.json, and line 45 uses it in the meeting request text
setup_task.sh line 49 explicitly states 'Please book the Server Room' in the meeting request text, and line 31 in expected_values.json confirms location

setup_task.sh line 49 names both attendees; setup_data.py confirms both contacts are created in Odoo: David Chen (line 43, david.chen@northbridge.org) and Luis Fernandez (line 51, luis.fernandez@northbridge.org)
setup_task.sh line 19 sets DURATION_MINUTES='90'; line 30 converts to 1.5 hours in expected_values.json

privileged_info_summary: The task requires scheduling a meeting with subject 'Systems Infrastructure Check' in the 'Server Room' location, with duration 90 minutes, including attendees Luis Fernandez and David Chen. The meeting request is provided in a dynamically generated text file at /home/ga/Documents/meeting_request.txt with a relative date (3 days from task start). Both attendee contacts are pre-created in the Odoo database during environment initialization. The meeting does not exist pre-task and must be scheduled by the agent.
